ibis.text: How should Long COVID be defined?
The definition of Long COVID should include a criterion for significant functional impairment from a patient's baseline.
orig: The Long COVID definition should also include a criterion for significant functional impairment from baseline

ibis.text: Long COVID should be recognised as an umbrella term that encompasses several different disorders.
orig: recognizing that Long COVID is an umbrella term encompassing several different disorders

ibis.text: How should Long COVID be clinically evaluated and diagnosed?
orig: clinical evaluation and management of patients with Long COVID

ibis.text: Diagnostic investigations for Long COVID should be tailored to the specific symptoms of each individual patient.
orig: Diagnostic investigations should be tailored to the symptoms of each patient

ibis.text: Because most standard screening tests return normal results for Long COVID patients, specific tests are necessary for a proper diagnosis.
orig: most standard screening tests will come back normal and specific tests are needed for diagnosis

ibis.text: What are the recommended models for Long COVID treatment and care?
Multidisciplinary teams are a useful model for the care and treatment of Long COVID patients.
orig: Multidisciplinary teams (MDTs) are a useful model for care of Long COVID

ibis.text: Treatment for Long COVID must be individualised and tailored to the patient history and physical examination.
orig: it requires an individual and tailored approach to each patient accounting for patient history and physical examination

ibis.text: What should be the primary focus areas for Long COVID research?
The impacts of COVID-19 infection on children should be established as a major research priority.
orig: the impacts of COVID-19 infection on children should be a research priority

ibis.text: Reducing the transmission of SARS-CoV-2 will help lower the overall incidence of Long COVID.
orig: Reducing transmission of SARS-CoV-2 will lower the incidence of Long COVID

ibis.text: How should the economic and societal impacts of Long COVID be addressed?
orig: Long COVID funding, economic impact and societal issues

ibis.text: Funding should be specifically allocated to research both Long COVID itself and its wider impact on society.
orig: Funding should be allocated to research Long COVID AND its impact on society

ibis.text: All funding for Long COVID research must be provided and managed in a transparent manner.
orig: All funding towards Long COVID research should be funded in a transparent manner
